label: 3301 to 3304 Repealed. , ,Pub. L. 99–198, title XIV, § 142199 Stat. 1552Dec. 23, 1985
notes: Section 3301, , , , required Secretary of Agriculture to transmit to Congress, not later than , an evaluation of economic and social consequences of programs of Extension Service and cooperative extension services.Pub. L. 95–113, title XIV, § 145991 Stat. 1016Sept. 29, 1977March 31, 1979

Section 3302, , , , required Secretary to conduct a comprehensive study of effects of changing climate and weather on crop and livestock productivity and submit a report, with recommendations, to President and Congress within twelve months after .Pub. L. 95–113, title XIV, § 146091 Stat. 1016Sept. 29, 1977Sept. 29, 1977

Section 3303, , , , required Secretary to conduct, and, within twelve months after , submit to President and Congress a report containing results of and Secretary’s recommendations concerning an investigation and analysis of practicability, desirability, and feasibility of collecting organic waste materials.Pub. L. 95–113, title XIV, § 146191 Stat. 1016Sept. 29, 1977September 29, 1977

Section 3304, , , , required Secretary to conduct a comprehensive study of status and future needs of agricultural research facilities and, within fourteen months after , submit to President and Congress a report on this study, with recommendations.Pub. L. 95–113, title XIV, § 146291 Stat. 1017Sept. 29, 1977September 29, 1977
